title: Handcuffs or Kisses
actors: Elaine Hammerstein, Julia Swayne Gordon, Dorothy Chappell
plot: Orphan Lois Walton is treated unkindly by her aunt, who has her placed in a reformatory. She and the other inmates are badly abused but are afraid to complain, and she remains silent after a riot is subdued. She arouses the sympat...
